'''Rylle'vak''', also known as the '''Quiet [[Ocean/Legends|Ocean]]''' in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], was a body of [[Water/Legends|water]] that was present on the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. [[Velhom'starn]] was located in this ocean.
